professionalSummary: I am an aspiring Data Scientist with a strong foundation in Python, Machine Learning, and Deep Learning. As a top 10 finalist in the "Pupilica AI Hackathon," I demonstrated practical skills in integrating AI APIs into user-friendly applications. I am passionate about Natural Language Processing (NLP) and building scalable data solutions. I have a proven ability to apply various ML algorithms for classification tasks and I'm currently expanding my expertise in advanced NLP architectures.

experiences.title: Machine Learning Intern
experiences.description: Successfully developed an "Apple Detection and Quality Analysis System" which was the core project required for the internship program. This role allowed me to bridge the gap between software and hardware by working extensively with both machine learning models and embedded systems. I gained hands-on experience in training computer vision algorithms to identify fruit quality and deploying these models onto embedded devices for real-time inference. Through this process, I significantly deepened my understanding of data preprocessing, model evaluation, and the practical challenges of edge AI computing.
